hero.description: Lose weight with doctor-monitored semaglutide in Kuala Lumpur.
hero.quote: Feel fuller sooner. Eat with control again. A medical plan that fits real life in Malaysia.

quickNote.title: A quick note before we start
quickNote.description: Semaglutide is a prescription medicine. It is not for everyone, and it is not a quick fix. You should always use it under medical supervision. This page is for education and to help you make an informed decision.

whatIs.desc: Semaglutide is a medicine that works on appetite and fullness signals in your body. For weight management, the well-known brand name is Wegovy.
whatIs.quote: Many people describe the change like this: You still enjoy food, but the 'food noise' becomes quieter. Portions feel easier. Snacking becomes less automatic.
whatIs.wegovyDesc: Made and dosed for chronic weight management
whatIs.ozempicDesc: Primarily for type 2 diabetes, may be used off-label
whatIs.offLabelNote: Off-label prescribing must be decided by a qualified doctor based on your health profile.

howItWorks.description: Semaglutide mimics a hormone called GLP-1 that is involved in hunger, fullness, and digestion.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Helps quiet the constant food thoughts

whoFor.description: Generally used for adults with obesity, or overweight with weight-related health risks.
whoFor.reason1: Diet and exercise alone have not worked long-term
whoFor.reason2: Appetite and cravings keep undoing progress
whoFor.reason3: Weight affecting energy, confidence, or health markers
whoFor.shouldNot1: Personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma
whoFor.shouldNot2: History of pancreatitis or gallbladder disease
whoFor.shouldNot3: Kidney problems related to dehydration risk
whoFor.extraCareTitle: Extra care needed if you have:
whoFor.extraCareDesc: Significant gastrointestinal conditions, or if you're breastfeeding. Stop well before planned pregnancy due to long half-life.

results.subtitle: Let's keep it honest.
results.stat1Desc: STEP 1 trial with significant average weight loss
results.noticeQuote: Many people notice changes earlier than the "scale moment": less urge to snack at night, better control around rice, roti, sweets, and late dinners, fewer cravings between meals.

stopSection.title: What happens if you stop?
stopSection.description: In the STEP 1 extension, after stopping semaglutide, participants regained a significant portion of weight loss over the following year, even with lifestyle advice.
stopSection.note: This supports the idea that obesity is chronic and maintenance planning is important.

nexusApproach.title: The Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur approach
nexusApproach.subtitle: Doctor-monitored weight loss, not just "a jab"
nexusApproach.step1Desc: Goals, history, current meds, past diet patterns, and risk factors
nexusApproach.step2Desc: Busy workdays, family dinners, social weekends - real routines
nexusApproach.step3Desc: Side effects, plateaus, travel weeks, stress eating - we monitor

prosCons.pro1: Strong evidence for meaningful weight loss
prosCons.pro2: Helps appetite control without constant willpower

faq.q1: How does semaglutide help with weight loss?
faq.a1: It mimics GLP-1, a hormone that helps regulate appetite and fullness, reducing hunger and slowing digestion.
faq.q2: How long to see weight loss results?
faq.a2: Appetite changes within first month, visible loss around 4-8 weeks, stronger results over 6-12 months.
faq.a3: Digestive issues like nausea, diarrhea, constipation. Most improve over time with gradual dose increase.
faq.q4: Is semaglutide same as Wegovy or Ozempic?
faq.a4: Same active ingredient but different indications. Wegovy for weight management, Ozempic primarily for diabetes.
faq.q5: Will I regain weight if I stop?
faq.a5: Weight regain can happen. Maintenance planning and habit support are crucial for long-term success.
faq.q6: Do I still need diet and exercise?
faq.a6: Yes. Wegovy is indicated with reduced-calorie diet and increased physical activity for best results.

cta.title: Ready to explore semaglutide in Kuala Lumpur?
cta.description: If you want a plan that feels safe, structured, and realistic for life in Malaysia, Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur can guide you through every step.
